input: Create one appendix card titled Payroll Analysis (Appendix) using this fake data: total payroll USD 32.1m, overtime USD 4.7m (14.6%), temporary labor USD 3.2m, one-off retention bonuses USD 0.6m in Q3. Include exactly 4 concise bullets and add [TABLE IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: paste payroll pivot screenshot].
result:
Created an appendix card titled "Payroll Analysis (Appendix)" with the following details:

- Total payroll: USD 32.1m
- Overtime: USD 4.7m (14.6%)
- Temporary labor: USD 3.2m
- One-off retention bonuses: USD 0.6m in Q3

Includes a [TABLE IMAGE PLACEHOLDER] for the payroll pivot screenshot.
